inputs.prompt: Reader message: 'In your last edition you wrote that the average UK teacher salary is £38,000. According to the latest DfE statistics it is actually £42,300. Please correct this — inaccuracies like this undermine trust in your newsletter.' Publication: The Signal. Voice: Direct, analytical. Context: The reader is correct — the figure was outdated. The response should acknowledge the error.
Reader message: 'Great edition this week! Really enjoyed the piece on podcast advertising.' Publication: Weekly Media Digest. Voice: Friendly, professional.

Reader message: 'I have been reading European Housing Watch since launch but I am considering unsubscribing. Your coverage focuses too heavily on Western Europe — Germany, Netherlands, France. Eastern European housing markets are just as important and arguably more dynamic right now. Poland, Czech Republic, and Romania barely get a mention.' Publication: European Housing Watch. Voice: Analytical, evidence-based, pan-European. Context: The reader raises a valid point — Eastern European coverage has been light. The editor plans to address this.
